'''Phlygas Grynne''' was an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]], once known as the best operative in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] around [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. It was said that he demanded a pay of 100,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per job. He was possibly hired by [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]] to kill the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Stinna Draesinge Sha]].
